description: Evaluates code management maturity—code management software, deployment methodology, repositories, secure storage, multi-environment access control, code updates, creation provisioning, and deletion deprovisioning.

capabilities.name: Code management software
capabilities.description: Code management software supports publishing, versioning, and deleting code for all or specific applications with automated change management.
evaluation_focus: Code management software for publishing, versioning, and deleting code
Enterprise-wide or scoped application coverage
Automated code management when users make changes

capabilities.name: Code Deployment methodology
capabilities.description: A formalized documented process governs code and its lifecycle, is automated by supporting software, and is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented code lifecycle management process
Automated code management process
Frequent code management process review

capabilities.name: Code Repositories
capabilities.description: All enterprise application code is stored securely in enterprise repositories that are scanned frequently and integrated with vulnerability management.
evaluation_focus: All enterprise application code in secure repositories
Frequent repository scanning integrated with vulnerability management

capabilities.name: Secure Code Storage
capabilities.description: All code is stored securely in repositories.
evaluation_focus: All code stored securely in repositories

capabilities.name: Code access in multiple environments
capabilities.description: Access to all code repositories is limited by function, controlled by CI/CD across repositories and staging locations, and reviewed frequently to prevent privilege creep.
evaluation_focus: Function-based access limits for all code repositories
CI/CD controls access to repositories and staging locations
Frequent repository access review to prevent privilege creep

capabilities.name: Code updates
capabilities.description: A code management process handles publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting code for all or critical applications via automated CI/CD and is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Code management process for publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting
Process scope for all or critical applications
Automated code management with CI/CD pipelines
Frequent code update process review

capabilities.name: Creation of code
capabilities.description: A process provisions code testing environments for creation and testing across all applications, automated via CI/CD.
evaluation_focus: Process to provision code testing environments
Code creation and testing environment for all applications
Automated provisioning via CI/CD

capabilities.name: Deletion of code
capabilities.description: A process deprovisions code testing environments after deletion and production movement for all applications, automated via CI/CD.
evaluation_focus: Process to deprovision code testing environments after deletion
Code deletion and deprovisioning for all applications
Automated deprovisioning via CI/CD

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
